title: Falcon - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Unpairing headset from Charge Stand via Clear Trusted Device List removes Charge Stand info from Software Update screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
Go to Home screen and tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
Scroll to Reset Device and tap it.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'.
Verify the headset disconnects from the app.
Remove the headset from the app's device list (if still shown).
Go to phone's Bluetooth settings and forget/unpair the headset.
Re-pair the headset with the phone and app by putting the headset into pairing mode and selecting it in the app.
Verify the headset is properly paired and connected.
Go to Device Settings → Software Update.
Observe any information displayed about the Charge Stand.
expected: The headset disconnects from the app after clearing the trusted device list. After re-pairing, the headset is properly connected. In Device Settings → Software Update, no information about the Charge Stand should appear.
